title: Twi'lek story-chain
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Twi'lek story-chain''' or '''memory-cord''' was a device used by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] species to record stories. Each link told a chapter of the story. In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], [[Jedi historian]] [[Tionne Solusar]] brought one of these back from her mission to [[Borgo Prime/Legends|Borgo Prime]]. She allowed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainee [[Tahiri Veila]] to take it from the ''[[Lore Seeker]]'' and bring it to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

[[Alema Rar]] later made one to record her abandonment on [[Tenupe]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
